checks.name: route-mix
checks.detail: Sustained 4 rps for 600s across 20 sessions at exact 10/25/55/10 route mix, 80/20 hot/distinct analysis mix, plus 10 rps coordinated bursts; Market Analysis, Trade Explorer, and the maximum-row product all participated.

checks.name: load-thresholds
checks.detail: Route p95 current 6.6ms, search 10.2ms, analysis 1260.7ms, CSV 11.2ms; cgroup memory 20.0%, RSS 21.7%, spill 0 bytes, with zero queue rejections, unretryable errors, and timeouts.

checks.name: cache-states
checks.detail: Scheduled hot, distinct, and CSV cache states were verified with zero cache violations under the dephased sustained schedule.
